name: revcast

preferences.description: Optional override for the hosted Revcast billing site. Leave empty unless you're testing your own deployment.

title: Revcast
description: Track Stripe revenue, MRR, failed payments, and workspaces without leaving Raycast.
author: bharath

commands.name: rev

commands.subtitle: See SaaS metrics instantly
commands.description: View today revenue, MRR, new customers, and failed payments.

commands.name: failed
commands.title: Failed Payments

commands.description: Inspect failed Stripe payments and mark them as reviewed.

commands.name: projects
commands.title: Projects
commands.subtitle: Manage Stripe projects
commands.description: Add, switch, and remove Stripe projects stored on your device.

commands.title: License & Billing

commands.description: Activate your Dodo Pro license and manage billing for Revcast.
